---
title: "Contact"
---

## Where To Ask Questions

For package-specific questions, bug reports, or feature requests, please use the GitHub Issues page for the relevant package. This keeps technical discussions visible and easier for maintainers and users to follow.

::: {.tutorial-grid}

::: {.tutorial-card .pipeline-card}
### SimiCPipeline

For questions about phenotype-specific GRN inference, preprocessing workflows, SimiC model execution, or RAS calculation in Python.

[Open SimiCPipeline issues](https://github.com/ML4BM-Lab/SimiCPipeline/issues){.btn .btn-primary}
[View SimiCPipeline repository](https://github.com/ML4BM-Lab/SimiCPipeline){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.tutorial-card .viz-card}
### SimiCviz

For questions about GRN assessment, visualization, R / Bioconductor workflows, and downstream analysis of RAS results.

[Open SimiCviz issues](https://github.com/ML4BM-Lab/SimiCviz/issues){.btn .btn-danger}
[View SimiCviz repository](https://github.com/ML4BM-Lab/SimiCviz){.btn .btn-outline-danger}
:::

:::

## General Inquiries

For broader questions about SimiC-Suite, manuscript-related inquiries, or collaboration, please contact the ML4BM Lab:

[mhernaez@unav.es](mailto:mhernaez@unav.es){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Website Issues

For issues with this documentation website itself, please use the SimiC-Suite repository.

[Open SimiC-Suite issues](https://github.com/ML4BM-Lab/SimiC-Suite/issues){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
